title: cladrastis lutea
intro: Cladrastis lutea, also known as the Yellowwood, is a deciduous tree native to eastern North America, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. These benefits may include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Cladrastis lutea typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from its bark, leaves, or roots, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
